original_image_tags: Aged typewritten document on light-colored paper, appearing to be a photocopy or carbon copy. The page shows a diagonal tear across the lower right section, which has been repaired with two strips of aged, translucent tape. The top edge has two punch holes. A faint, reversed "Office Memorandum" watermark is visible at the top.

elements.description: Typed letter dated August 27, 1947, addressed to the Director of the FBI regarding 'Flying Discs - Tacoma, Wn.' The text discusses an investigation into the flying discs story and mentions individuals named Johnson, Lieutenant Brown, and Captain Davidson.
Faint reversed watermark text visible at the top of the page, reading 'Office Memorandum' and 'UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT'.
Underlined text at the bottom left reading 'AIR MAIL' and 'SPECIAL DELIVERY'.

judge.reason: Both agree on the 'Office Memorandum' watermark and page condition, but B adds 'UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT' and 'AIR MAIL' text not mentioned by A, without contradiction.
